text: I feel a sense of curiosity and anticipation. The first room, with its glass walls and glowing blue screen, feels both transparent and mysterious—an invitation to witness or participate in ideas being formed. Moving to the next space, the vibrant wall labeled 'R + D' heightens my sense of inquisitiveness. Here, the promise of research and development, of responsive and rapidly evolving creations, inspires me to reflect on the ways humans connect with technology. I feel energised, as if I am on the threshold of discovery.
